name: No Fail Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Double the recipe for 2 crust pie.
2. Cut shortening into flour and salt until particles are about the size of small peas.
3. Sprinkle in water, one tablespoon at a time, tossing with a fork until all flour is moistened and pastry almost cleans the side of the bowl (up to 2 teaspoons of water can be added if necessary).
4. Gather pastry into a ball; shape into a flattened round on lightly floured cloth-covered board.
5. Roll pastry larger than inverted pie plate (9 inches in diameter x 1 1/4 inches high).
6. Fold pastry into quarters; place in plate.
7. Unfold and ease into plate, pressing firmly against the bottom and side.
8. Trim edge of pastry 1 inch from rim of plate.
9. Fold and roll pastry under, even with plate; flute.
